localized_texts.text: Snow City Singapore

Brave the sub-zero chill right here in Singapore with family and friends. The Singapore Snow City is the first of its kind to bring the Arctic here to the tropics.Snow City is Singapore's first indoor snow centre located within the Science Centre, Singapore area beside Ommi-Theatre in Jurong East. Snow City introduces the concept of snow and cold climates in a fun, entertaining and educational way. Introduce your kids to the Inuits’ way of life with life-sized igloos in the Arctic Snow Playground and ice fishing at The Mezzanine. Experience snowfall at The Upper Mezzanine level. Head down to the Arctic Snow Slide for a thrilling three-storey high ride down.
Experience the thrill of the Arctic with life-sized igloos and ice fishing.
Witness enchanting snowfall in a tropical setting at the Upper Mezzanine level.
Brave the Arctic Snow Slide for an exhilarating three-story ride down.

Escape the Singapore heat and experience winter fun at Snow City! This one-of-a-kind attraction, located within the Science Centre, offers a frosty adventure at -5°C. Learn about snow and cold climates through interactive exhibits. Kids will love exploring life-sized igloos, simulating ice fishing, and witnessing real snowfall. Take a thrilling ride down the 3-story Arctic Snow Slide for an unforgettable experience!
Dress Warm: It's -5°C inside! Rentals might cost extra
Expect Crowds: Deals can mean more visitors.
What’s included: 1 hour snow play (other add-ons can be purchased onsite)
What’s included: complimentary use of jackets and boots
What’s included: Dyed Ice Playground
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: at Ticketing counter
How to use: Please process to Snow City ticketing counter for admission
How to use: Please arrive 15-30 minutes prior to your snow play timeslot.

Terms & Conditions: Children below 7 years old must be supervised by an adult at all times. Winter jacket and boots are provided with purchase of admission ticket to Snow Chamber. Wearing of long pants is compulsory to keep you safe and warm in the subzero temperature of the Snow Chamber. For hygiene purposes, wearing of socks is required when using house boots. Personal cameras are prohibited in the Snow Chamber. Please approach the photographers for assistance. *Food and drinks are prohibited in the Snow Chamber. Skiing and Snowboarding are not allowed in the snow chamber. Snow City Singapore may take photographs or recordings of any visitor for any purpose, without prior approval or compensation. Getting Here: Direct public buses* 66, 178, 198, 335 (alight at Snow City stop) MRT Train* Alight at Jurong East Station on the East West Line and walk or transfer to Bus No. 335 or 66. *10 mins walk from Jurong East Bus Interchange / MRT Station
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
What’s included: Standard Admission
What’s included: Complimentary Use of Winter Jackets and Boots
What’s included: 1 Hour Snow Play
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing Counter

Terms & Conditions: Tickets purchased are valid for 180 days from the date of purchase. A reservation is required for entry. Your ticket does not guarantee admission without a prior reservation. Please ensure you book your date and time before visiting by clicking on the following link: ticket.snowcity.com.sg/reservations. Children below 7 years old must be supervised by an adult at all times. Winter jackets and boots are provided with the purchase of admission tickets to Snow Chamber. Wearing long pants is compulsory to keep you safe and warm in the subzero temperature of the Snow Chamber. For hygiene purposes, wearing socks is required when using house boots. Personal cameras are prohibited in the Snow Chamber. Please approach the photographers for assistance. *Food and drinks are prohibited in the Snow Chamber. Skiing and Snowboarding are not allowed in the snow chamber. Snow City Singapore may take photographs or recordings of any visitor for any purpose, without prior approval or compensation. Outside food and drinks are not permitted inside the venue. For additional information on the safety and hygiene measures, please visit Snow City's official website.
1 Hour Snow Play With Dyed Ice Playground
1 Hour Snow Play with Dyed Ice Playground + 1 Bumper Car
